sentences.translation: Baka je pripremila tradicionalno jelo za porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother prepared a traditional dish for the family.

sentences.translation: Skuhala je mansaf s mesom, pirinčem i jogurtom.
sentences.translationEn: She cooked mansaf with meat, rice, and yogurt.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الْجَمِيعُ حَوْلَ الطَّبَقِ الْكَبِيرِ وَأَكَلُوا.
sentences.translation: Svi su sjeli oko velikog tanjira i jeli.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone sat around the large plate and ate.

sentences.translation: Baka je rekla: Hrana okuplja porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother said: Food brings the family together.
